title: Halloween Kaleidoscope
story: As the kaleidoscope turns, it paints a picture of a serene pumpkin patch, where the air is filled with the scent of spiced cider and the gentle rustle of autumn leaves.

details.label: Completed Size
details.info: 7.0 x 7.1 inches or 17.8 x 18.1 cm on 14 count aida
